examples: I've been to see an internist, a nutritionist, and a chiropractor.
She said that her internist had recommended that she come.
Plotnikoff, an internist, speaks Somali and has many Somali patients.
In 2002 Hicks hired internist Samantha Collier to bring medical credibility to the ratings.
As a practicing internist I will have a certain curiosity to see what happens to Mubarak now.
